mapper.select: SELECT order_id, order_number, order_type, total_price, order_status, created_at FROM orders ORDER BY order_id DESC
SELECT order_id, order_number, order_type, total_price, order_status, created_at FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( order_number, order_type, total_price, order_status ) VALUES ( #{orderNumber}, #{orderType}, #{totalPrice}, #{orderStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_number = #{orderNumber}, order_type = #{orderType}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, order_status = #{orderStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
